parsed_review.summary: CP00-517 is a descriptor-only AI Governance (RP17) closeout pack covering exactly 150 planned units (RP17.P01.M06.S05-RP17.P02.M02.S22). Read-only inspection of registry.js/service.js/validators.js/index.js/test/contract/manifest/plan confirms: (1) coverage math is exact — deliverable distribution (impl 77, ui 23, fixture 4, test 20, hermes 4, claude_review 7, contract 3, security_audit 6, failure_recovery 6 = 150) and micro-phase/micro-title counts match the baseline, registry requirements, validator, and tests; (2) the pack honestly claims production_ready=false and runtime_ready=false (status implemented_pending_review) with no overclaim; (3) descriptor-only/no-real-data/no-write/no-runtime/no-leak/deny-over-allow boundaries are rigorously frozen across every result object, and the package source performs no fs/network/db/child_process/env I/O; (4) Claude is held as read-only and not final approver (claude_is_final_approval=false, promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false, manifest claude_not_final_approver=true, enterprise_trust_not_claimed_from_local_validation=true); (5) Hermes patterns are descriptor-only (no_hermes_runtime_receipt=true), used solely for deterministic review packet/receipt summaries, not product runtime; (6) CP178+ review hardening is functioning — tools restricted to Read/Grep/Glob, auth preflight passed, and the prior API-Overloaded attempt-01 was correctly preserved as invalid_not_accepted and not counted as valid evidence; (7) contract current_pack, closeout-pack-plan.json entry, and registry binding all agree (deep-equal cross-checks). No P0/P1/P2 defects found. Two P3 informational notes cover the expected-pending post-review artifacts and the read-only verification basis. This review does not block pack or goal closeout, both of which correctly remain gated on post-review artifacts and human final approval.

findings.title: Post-review closeout artifacts not yet present (expected pending state)
findings.details: manifest required_pack_artifacts and evidence_refs list claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, and construction-inspection.json, and review_hardening references raw-output.json and review-receipt.json (artifacts/closeout-pack-claude-review/cp00-517/). Currently only manifest.json and command-evidence.json exist in the pack dir, and the accepted raw-output.json/review-receipt.json are absent because they are produced FROM this review run. This is the correct mid-flow state: pack_level_claude_review.status is 'pending' and valid_review_receipts is empty, so the pack is not prematurely closed. Not a defect.
findings.recommendation: Keep closeout gated until the post-review steps (normalize -> receipt_validate -> finding_adjudication -> construction_inspection -> final_closeout_validation) generate and validate the five required artifacts; do not commit CP00-517 as closed until exactly one valid review receipt and the adjudication/inspection artifacts exist.

findings.title: Validation command results taken as attested; corroborated by static inspection only
findings.details: command-evidence.json records exit_code 0 for node --check/--test on all sources, rp05-rp17 validates, closeout-pack-plan/weighted/spec/rp00/goal/fullplan validate, npm test, npm run validate, npm run build, and git diff --check. As a read-only reviewer I cannot execute these; I corroborated correctness by static inspection of source/contract/plan/manifest consistency (validator deep-equals contract<->registry<->descriptors; coverage counts and ranges match across all references), which strongly supports the recorded exit codes. production_ready=false and no_real_data=true are independently supported by inspection (no I/O in package src).
findings.recommendation: Continue to require the recorded post-review gated validation (closeout-pack:review:run/normalize/receipt:validate, closeout-pack:validate, git diff --check --cached) before commit so the attested command results are re-verified deterministically at closeout.
